title: Hardcore Deluxe
description: Hardcore plugin that improves normal hardcore with cool death effects, simple spectator mode, and an easy revive system.
body: # Hardcore Deluxe A clean and powerful hardcore plugin for Paper and Spigot servers. Adds cinematic death effects, controlled spectator mode, and a simple revive system. When a player dies, they spectate at their exact death location for a set time. --- ## Features * **Hardcore Mode** – Forces hardcore in all worlds * **Death Effects** – Red fireworks and strong death sounds * **Spectator Mode** – Configurable spectate time with countdown * **Chunk Limit** – Restrict how far dead players can spectate * **Revive System** – Bring dead players back to life * **Help Menu** – Simple GUI for commands * **PlaceholderAPI** – Death status placeholders --- ## Installation 1. Download the JAR from Modrinth 2. Place it in the `plugins` folder 3. Restart the server 4. Edit `config.yml` --- ## Commands * `/hardcoredeluxe` or `/hd` – Main command * `/hd help` – Open help menu * `/hd revive ` – Revive a player * `/hd reviveall` – Revive all players * `/hd spectatetime ` – Set spectate time * `/hd spectatechunks ` – Set spectate chunk limit * `/hd spawnradius ` – Set revive spawn radius * `/hd deathreason ` – Toggle death message reason * `/hd deathsound ` – Toggle death sounds * `/hd reload` – Reload config --- ## Permissions * `hardcoredeluxe.admin` – Access to all commands * `hardcoredeluxe.help` – Open help menu * `hardcoredeluxe.revive` – Revive players * `hardcoredeluxe.reviveall` – Revive all players * `hardcoredeluxe.spectatetime` – Set spectate time * `hardcoredeluxe.spectatechunks` – Set spectate chunk limit * `hardcoredeluxe.spawnradius` – Set revive spawn radius * `hardcoredeluxe.deathreason` – Toggle death messages * `hardcoredeluxe.deathsound` – Toggle death sounds * `hardcoredeluxe.reload` – Reload config --- ## PlaceholderAPI * `%hardcoredeluxe__status%` – Alive or Died * `%hardcoredeluxe_status%` – Alive or Died --- ## Author **DrafterPlus**
